scores.correctness_notes: Response covers all three required elements (service with env vars, HTTP checks, log target) with correct field names and structure. However, it omits the `on-check-failure` field in the service definition that links health check failures to service actions (e.g., restart) — which the gold standard identifies as a key pattern. The agent uses `on-failure: restart` instead, which handles process exit failures, not check failures — a meaningful semantic difference.
scores.hallucination_notes: none — all fields used (backoff-delay, backoff-factor, backoff-limit, after, requires, user, group, on-failure, level, threshold, etc.) are valid Pebble layer specification fields
